channel.title: apps on damienomurchu
channel.description: Recent content in apps on damienomurchu

item.title: Adding a linux Desktop app entry
item.description: Adding a linux Desktop app entry Adding a desktop entry for an application can be useful. Package managers tend to do this automatically for you but what about when you install an application manually? Simply create the following desktop entry for your application: # $HOME/.local/share/applications/<application>.desktop [Desktop Entry] Encoding=UTF-8 Version=1.0 Type=Application Terminal=false Exec=/path/to/executable Name=Name-of-Application Icon=/path/to/icon
